# Cats Can Dance

> A culture brand uniting dance music, pet culture and streetwear into one ecosystem.
> We host underground events, drop limited streetwear, curate playlists, and grow a global community
> of music lovers who happen to love their pets just as much as their record collections.

## What we do
- Underground event series ("Episodes") in cities around the world
- Limited streetwear drops fusing rave aesthetic with cat / pet culture
- Curated playlists on Spotify, YouTube and SoundCloud
- Community programs for artists, venues, and investors

## Key pages
- Home: https://catscandance.com/
- About: https://catscandance.com/about
- Shop: https://catscandance.com/shop
- Events: https://catscandance.com/events
- For Artists: https://catscandance.com/for-artists
- For Venues: https://catscandance.com/for-venues
- For Investors: https://catscandance.com/for-investors

## Contact
- Email: hello@catscandance.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/catscandance

## Brand keywords
dance music, electronic, house, techno, underground, streetwear, pet culture, cats, rave, community, drops, events, playlists
